The [[Neuro-Saav Technologies/Legends|Neuro-Saav Technologies]] '''VXI-3 electrotelescope''' was a model of [[Electrotelescope/Legends|electrotelescope]]. A small unit, it weighed around thirty-five [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] and could be moved by using an inbuilt [[Repulsorlift generator/Legends|repulsorlift generator]]. Nearly a dozen VXI-3 units were used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to provide an early-warning system for [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. They surrounded the base and were strategically placed at observation posts. The system failed to detect an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]], as it was hampered by having to deal with all of the asteroid and comet activity in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]].<ref name="EGWT" />
